prose:
Pyridine Fukui reactivity indices — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact integrals) in PySCF, gas phase (no solvent), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`, single-point (no geometry optimization). Cation: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion: charge –1, multiplicity 2. SCF converged for neutral, cation, and anion states.
Most electrophilic site: atom 1 (N) with Fukui f⁺ = 0.48422572.
Most nucleophilic site: atom 4 (C) with Fukui f⁻ = 0.11826260.

Command:
```
chemkit fukui pyridine.xyz   --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp   --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --out pyridine_fukui_reactivity_dft.json --stdout json
```
Output JSON: `pyridine_fukui_reactivity_dft.json`
